title: Arc<Mutex<Connection>> blocks concurrent requests
evidence: src/lib.rs:14 — `pub type Db = Arc<Mutex<Connection>>` serializes all DB access; under load, requests queue behind the mutex
suggestion: Consider a connection pool (r2d2, deadpool-sqlite) for concurrent request handling

title: idiomatic score 0.58 — below average for Rust
evidence: scores.json idiomatic=0.58; common Rust patterns (error types via thiserror, typed extractors, connection pooling) are not used
suggestion: Define a custom error type implementing IntoResponse instead of tuple-based ApiError
